text.p: I wish to write this letter to tell you about the national population and housing census that took place some few months ago here in Nigeria, and the gain from it to we, the citizens of the country.
Also, the population census was is a good excercise that every country should practice, because it helps alot to know the number of citizens living in a country and to plant very well for her future.

Further more, during our own, I was in school, but I had to travelled home for the census because I didn't want to mise it, because of the benefit that are there in. Benefit like distribution of social amminities from the local government to the villages.

More over, some of the benefits of the national census are the opotunity to know the number of languages in a country and the distribution of any thing that the government would want to distribute to these settlers.
The important of house census help the government to know the houses and the implement in the house as so to know how to distribute Nepa N light (Power Holding Company) to the citizens.
In conclusion, census should be conducting in Nigeria so that government should always know the number of citizens in her country.
